phase: Implement dead code detection via AST

arquivos_criados.descricao: DeadCodeAnalyzerImpl using Babel AST for comprehensive dead code detection
17 comprehensive test cases for AST-based dead code analysis

features_implemented.unused_exports_detection: ✅ Finds exported items never used within file
features_implemented.unused_imports_detection: ✅ Detects imports that are never referenced
features_implemented.unused_variables_detection: ✅ Identifies variables declared but not used
features_implemented.typescript_support: ✅ Full TypeScript syntax via Babel parser
features_implemented.smart_filtering: ✅ Skips React, underscore-prefixed vars, single-letter vars

detection_strategies.strategy_1_babel_ast: Uses @babel/parser to create AST with TypeScript/JSX plugins
detection_strategies.strategy_2_multi_pass: First pass: collect declarations, second pass: track usage
detection_strategies.strategy_3_smart_reporting: Conservative approach to avoid false positives
detection_strategies.strategy_4_severity_low: All dead code issues marked as LOW severity (not breaking)

special_cases_handled.react_imports: ✅ React import never flagged as unused (common JSX pattern)
special_cases_handled.underscore_vars: ✅ Variables prefixed with _ are skipped (intentional ignore)
special_cases_handled.short_names: ✅ Single-letter variables ignored to reduce noise
special_cases_handled.type_annotations: ✅ TypeScript interfaces and type exports handled
special_cases_handled.multi_export_statements: ✅ export const x = 1, y = 2; patterns parsed correctly

security_compliance.SEC-02: ✅ Path validation for all file inputs
security_compliance.SEC-07: ✅ Graceful error handling (no stack traces to user)

performance_notes.parsing_overhead: Low — only parses files that are specified
performance_notes.cache_opportunity: Could cache ASTs for repeated analysis

integration_readiness.correlation_ready: ✅ Can be integrated with correlation engine
integration_readiness.bundle_integration: ✅ Works alongside BundleAnalyzer for complete bundle analysis

notes: DeadCodeAnalyzer complete with AST-based analysis. 17/17 tests passing. Detects unused exports, imports, and variables using Babel parser. Ready for CLI integration (Task 2.2.5) and correlation with bundle analysis.
